reference: Certainly not. You may be perfectly healthy and alright, but that doesn't mean that you can do any form of exercise during pregnancy. There is no need to put yourself and your baby at risk. Skip the ten-mile race. You may go for yoga and other stretching exercises if you want.
text: Certainly not. You may be perfectly healthy and all right, but that doesn't mean that you can do any form of exercise during pregnancy. There is no need to put yourself and your baby at risk. Skip the ten-mile race. You may go for yoga and other stretching exercises.
